title: BNK.RLVR.RVT.BSP.001.TIER_UPGRADE_RECORDED — Tier upgrade recorded
description: Resource event emitted by AGG.BSP.001.TIE.TIER_OF_CASE when a case transitions to a strictly higher tier. Caused either by CMD.APPLY_TIER_TRANSITION (algorithmic) or by CMD.CLOSE_PRESCRIBER_OVERRIDE (realignment after override closure when the algorithmic tier is above the override tier). Per ADR-TECH-STRAT-001 Rule 3, the payload is a domain-event DDD form — the atomic transition itself, not the post-state.

event_id.description: Unique identifier of this resource event. Used by downstream consumers as the idempotency key when reacting to the upgrade.

case_id.description: CORRELATION KEY. Reference to the participation case.

from_tier_code.description: Tier code the case was in before this transition.

to_tier_code.description: Tier code the case is in after this transition (strictly higher than from_tier_code per BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE ordering).

cause.description: Origin of the transition. SCORE_THRESHOLD = algorithmic decision triggered by SCO. OVERRIDE_REALIGNMENT = the override has been closed and the algorithmic tier is above the previously-applied override tier.

trigger_event_id.description: Causation — the upstream event id that ultimately caused this transition (BNK.RLVR.RVT.SCORE_THRESHOLD_REACHED for SCORE_THRESHOLD, BNK.RLVR.RVT.OVERRIDE_CLOSED for OVERRIDE_REALIGNMENT).

tier_definitions_version.description: BNK.RLVR.CAP.REF.001.TIE definitions version used to validate the tier codes at transition time.

occurred_at.description: Timestamp at which the aggregate committed the transition (ISO-8601, UTC).
